title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
